name: Void Lens
lore: A black crystal that reveals hidden atlas paths.
effects: Reveal hidden cards that meet non-level gates.

name: Bloodquill Sigil
lore: Ink from this quill drinks mana debt and writes in corruption.
effects: Mana costs can be paid with corruption when mana is insufficient.

name: Chronicle Die
lore: A six-sided relic that remembers one second chance each dawn.
effects: Gain one risk-check reroll per day.

name: Amber Spindle
lore: Threads one extra turn into each expedition.
effects: Every 5th choice refunds 1 time turn.

name: Stone Nightingale
lore: Sings in faction dialects no human should know.
effects: +1 reputation on first social choice each day.

name: Mirror-Ash Mantle
lore: Reflects one wound back into smoke.
effects: First HP loss each day is reduced by 1.

name: Tide Compass
lore: Points to endings, not north.
effects: Shows one Golden Path hint per arc phase.

name: Hollow Crown
lore: A crown that weighs less than guilt.
effects: +2 might during boss nodes, +2 corruption on success.

name: Ink Harbor
lore: Maps itself each time you fail.
effects: Fail-forward grants +1 knowledge xp bonus.

name: Dawn Key
lore: Only turns in doors that should not exist.
effects: Unlocks pacifist ending predicates in both arcs.

name: Ember Knife
lore: Keeps a faint red edge even in rain.
effects: +1 might on combat checks.

name: Ashbuckler Coat
lore: Smells permanently of cedar smoke.
effects: -1 hp loss from hazard checks.

name: Glass Needle
lore: Used to etch map sigils into crystal.
effects: +1 craft on puzzle checks.

name: Briar Tonic
lore: Bitter medicine brewed from fungal bark.
effects: Restore 2 hp when consumed.

name: Scorch Lantern
lore: Burns blue in cursed rooms.
effects: Reveal danger tag before entering node.

name: Cracked Ward
lore: A chipped charm from a ruined chapel.
effects: +1 resolve on mixed outcomes.

name: Steel Rosary
lore: Each bead marks a spared life.
effects: +1 pilgrims reputation from aid choices.

name: Vault Spike
lore: Pried from a gate older than cities.
effects: Open one locked card requirement bypass per run.

name: Marrow Rope
lore: Braided from giant reed marrow.
effects: -1 time cost on one traversal choice/day.

name: Hex Slate
lore: Records sigils and refuses to forget.
effects: +1 knowledge when studying archives.

name: Ember Mail
lore: Warm armor that resists panic.
effects: +1 resolve in boss nodes.

name: Dusk Halberd
lore: A polearm tuned to low frequencies.
effects: +2 might on first combat check each day.

name: Salt Orb
lore: Pulls moisture out of corrupted air.
effects: Reduce corruption gain by 1 once per scene.

name: Char Archive
lore: A burnt codex with surviving index tabs.
effects: +1 knowledge and +1 xp from lore scenes.

name: Hollow Boots
lore: Footwear that leaves no trail.
effects: -1 time on first choice in each dungeon.

name: Shard Buckle
lore: Flashes when nearby options are gated.
effects: Show unmet requirement hints in UI.

name: Forge Idol
lore: A tiny anvil blessed by meteor priests.
effects: +2 craft on treasure nodes.

name: Lumen Thread
lore: Spins mana into stable filaments.
effects: +1 max mana.

name: Ink Goggles
lore: Can read map layers hidden in dark water.
effects: Reveal one hidden card in current region/day.

name: Rift Spear
lore: Makes no sound when thrown.
effects: +1 might and +1 resolve on success tiers.

name: Royal Censer
lore: Diffuses incense that calms hostile rites.
effects: Boss node difficulty -1 once per arc.

name: Storm Folio
lore: Annotated weather from before the Shattering.
effects: +2 knowledge, +1 corruption on fail-forward.

name: Pale Compass
lore: Points toward unresolved arc objectives.
effects: Highlights one arc-critical card.

name: Wellglass Shield
lore: Reflects astral debris into harmless sparks.
effects: Fail-forward hp penalty reduced by 2.

name: Archon Fang
lore: Trophy carved from a sky-beast mandible.
effects: +3 might in climaxes.

name: Prayer Battery
lore: Stores whispers as mana charges.
effects: Start each day with +1 mana.

name: Silver Past
lore: A mirror shard that recalls one prior branch.
effects: Undo one non-ending choice per run.

name: Bastion Seal
lore: A military seal recognized in emberside keeps.
effects: +2 concord reputation on oath scenes.

name: Orrery Key
lore: Unlocks celestial mechanisms by hum frequency.
effects: Puzzle checks gain +12 target bonus.

name: Quietum Vial
lore: Silences arcane recoil in your veins.
effects: Set corruption gain to 0 for one scene.

name: Lion of Glass
lore: A statue that prowls in reflections.
effects: +2 resolve and reveal hidden branch exits.

name: Sable Contract
lore: Signed by a court that no longer exists.
effects: Set undercourt reputation floor to 1.

name: Ember Orbit
lore: Seven embers circle your wrist when danger rises.
effects: Combat checks consume 0 mana every other turn.

name: Dawnledger
lore: Records every ending you deny.
effects: Unlocks NG+ modifier picker.

name: Hush Chalice
lore: Drinks thunder and leaves calm.
effects: Daily upkeep world pressure -1 region corruption once/day.

name: Penumbral Pin
lore: A brooch that edits your silhouette.
effects: Hazard checks treat mixed as success once per day.

name: Starline Reel
lore: Spools thread between constellations.
effects: Travel choices may skip one intermediate dungeon node.

name: Choir Helm
lore: Hears all outcomes before one is chosen.
effects: Preview risk tier probabilities.

name: Briar Throne Shard
lore: A splinter from a kingless throne.
effects: +2 might, +2 corruption on every success.

name: Last Lighthouse Lens
lore: Its beam maps endings across fog.
effects: Unlock one hidden ending predicate when equipped.

name: Rust Signet
lore: A signet from a fallen quartermaster.
effects: Minor vendor discounts.

name: Sky Suture Kit
lore: Needles meant for repairing glider cloth.
effects: Recover +1 hp on rest nodes.
